posts.author: rolinhudson (rolin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

two way sync with iCloud contacts and Monday.com
adding or changing contacts in iCloud or for apple products would create or update the same contact info in a Monday board.
when editing or creating the contact in Monday this will also reflect in the iCloud contacts app.

What are you trying to achieve

two way sync with iCloud contact list
